root: ^Welcome back sis, I have great news!
^I got a meeting with the mayor and he finally agreed to let us expend, starting tomorrow we will have access to the other side of the city
^That's great! That should largely increase our amount of sales
^You should take yourself a moment to rest after all of this, you're been working so hard recently
^I would love to but I have another meeting tonight
^Don't worry about that, I will do it so take a day off
^Really? That's nice of you, I'll let you handle it then
